## User [2026-01-14T18:28:31.426Z]

[Tool Result: (10 lines) ---...](https://claude.ai/code) as my AI pair programmer. Each post is a reflection on what I worked on, what I learned, and insights about AI-assisted development.
    11→
    12→**What you'll find here:**
    13→- Real projects and real problems solved with AI assistance
    14→- Insights about effective prompting and collaboration with AI
    15→- Code snippets, techniques, and patterns
    16→- Honest reflections on what works and what doesn't
    17→
    18→</div>
    19→
    20→## Recent Posts
    21→
    22→<ul class="post-list">
    23→{% for post in site.posts limit:10 %}
    24→  <li class="post-list-item">
    25→    <h3 class="post-list-title">
    26→      <a href="{{ post.url | relative_url }}">{{ post.title }}</a>
    27→    </h3>
    28→    <div class="post-list-meta">
    29→      {{ post.date | date: "%B %d, %Y" }}
    30→      {% if post.read_time %} · {{ post.read_time }} min read{% endif %}
    31→    </div>
    32→    {% if post.excerpt %}
    33→    <p class="post-list-excerpt">{{ post.excerpt | strip_html | truncatewords: 30 }}</p>
    34→    {% endif %}
    35→  </li>
    36→{% endfor %}
    37→</ul>
    38→
    39→{% if site.posts.size > 10 %}
    40→<p><a href="{{ '/archive' | relative_url }}">View all posts →</a></p>
    41→{% endif %}
    42→

]

The new design is live. Looking much better with:

- **Warm cream background** (#FFFBF5)
- **Card-based layout** with subtle shadows and borders

## Assistant [2026-01-14T18:33:07.253Z]

The redesign is complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

**Before → After:**

| Aspect | Before | After |
|--------|--------|-------|
| Background | Pure white (#fff) | Warm cream (#FFFBF5) |
| Headings | Sans-serif, dark | Playfair Display serif, terracotta |
| Layout | Flat, bordered items | Card-based with shadows |
| Typography | System fonts | Inter + Playfair Display |
| List bullets | Standard dots | Terracotta arrows (→) |
| Post list | Border-separated | Individual hoverable cards |
| Header | Plain | Sticky with refined nav |
| Links | Blue (#0066cc) | Terracotta (#B8654A) |

The blog now has a warm, modern aesthetic with the cream white base you requested. The cards add visual hierarchy, and the serif headings give it a more editorial feel.

## Assistant [2026-01-14T19:55:38.371Z]

From my analysis, everything looks secure:

- **All network requests use HTTPS** with 200 status codes
- **No console errors** detected
- **No mixed content** (no HTTP resources)
- **Config uses `https://`** for the site URL
- **Google Fonts loads via HTTPS**

A few possibilities for what you might be seeing:

1. **Temporary deployment issue** - GitHub Pages may have had a brief moment during deployment where the certificate wasn't fully propagated

2. **www vs non-www** - Are you accessing `www.sebastianhondl.com` instead of `sebastianhondl.com`? The www subdomain might not be configured

3. **Browser cache** - Old cached content from before HTTPS was fully set up

4. **Different device/browser** - The warning might be appearing elsewhere

Could you tell me more about where you're seeing the error? Is it:
- A warning icon in the browser address bar?
- An error message on the page itself?
- A specific browser or device?
